rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount has no relationship to Elec. Code §276.016, which governs unlawful solicitation and distribution of mail-in ballot applications. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 276.016. UNLAWFUL SOLICITATION AND DISTRIBUTION OF APPLICATION TO VOTE BY MAIL.
_note: No conflict; the cited election code provision is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
